overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a black sports car driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates through downtown streets with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, transitioning into a high-speed boost mode with dramatic light trails before approaching the Kabayan commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown boulevard with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: cruising at moderate speed through the main downtown artery, passing palm trees and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large holographic billboard featuring a character portrait against dark sky
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows forming the skyline
reflective dark road surface with rain puddles mirroring neon lights
rotating digital advertisement displays on building facades
tropical trees lining the street median
purple neon signage for El Guapo establishment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic downtown boulevard at night, with the camera following a black sports car cruising past holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lights from advertisements, including a prominent Johnny Silverhand billboard, while palm trees line the left side of the wide multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with concrete barriers and intersections

events.description: vehicle slows down significantly to navigate a tight right turn between barriers
car passes through intersection with zebra crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate a right turn between concrete barriers and commercial buildings with Japanese signage

entered.detail: low concrete wall separating the road from the sidewalk
commercial building featuring prominent Japanese character signage
street level commercial storefronts with warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The car decelerates to navigate a tighter commercial street section, passing concrete dividers and buildings with Japanese kanji signage. The holographic advertisements that were prominent now recede into the distance as the vehicle maneuvers through an intersection with zebra crossings, transitioning from the wide boulevard to a more enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed arterial roadway with elevated sections and overhead signs

events.description: car activates high-speed boost creating dramatic red and white light trails and motion blur
passing under the Broad street sign into a denser commercial corridor with purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: accelerating to high speed with visual motion blur effects and light trails, weaving through lanes on the elevated roadway

notable_agents.action: distant car traveling in same direction ahead on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: red overhead street sign indicating Skyline North direction
red overhead sign for Broad street intersection
building facade with prominent purple neon lighting and vertical windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle dramatically accelerates into a high-speed boost mode, generating streaking red and white light trails across the screen. It speeds under overhead signs for Skyline North and Broad Street, passing a purple-lit building on the right while the glass skyscrapers shift from the left to directly ahead, creating a sense of rapid forward motion through the neon-lit canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: Kabayan commercial district with dense neon signage and restaurants

events.description: entering the Kabayan foods commercial area with prominent red neon signage and ground floor restaurants
vehicle slows down and prepares to turn at the intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching the commercial district intersection, navigating around parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk near the Kabayan Foods sign

entered.detail: large red neon sign for Kabayan Foods with bright lettering
building facade with Japanese hotel signage and vertical neon strips
illuminated ground floor dining establishments with outdoor seating areas

segments.scene_description: As the car decelerates from its high-speed run, it enters the Kabayan Foods commercial district characterized by dense red neon signage and ground-floor restaurants. The vehicle approaches an intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk and parked cars, while the purple-lit building from earlier shifts to the left background as the camera orients toward the Kabayan signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic downtown that transitions from a wide, open boulevard into a tighter urban commercial corridor. It begins by trailing a black sports car cruising past towering glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards, including a prominent Johnny Silverhand advertisement, while wet asphalt reflects the vibrant city lights. As the vehicle moves forward, the expansive multi-lane street lined with palm trees begins to narrow, and the large-scale holograms recede into the distance. The scene then shifts as the car decelerates to navigate a more enclosed section of the city, passing concrete dividers and buildings adorned with Japanese kanji signage. Finally, the camera follows the car through a street intersection with zebra crossings, completing the transition from the grand boulevard to the dense commercial district.

The shot follows a high-speed surge through a neon-lit urban canyon that gradually slows into a dense commercial district. It begins with the vehicle dramatically accelerating into a boost mode, generating streaking red and white light trails as it speeds under overhead signs for Skyline North and Broad Street. As the camera rushes forward, glass skyscrapers shift from the periphery to the center of the frame, passing a purple-lit building on the right. The scene then shifts as the car decelerates, transitioning from the open speed of the highway into the Kabayan Foods district characterized by dense red neon signage and ground-floor restaurants. Finally, the vehicle approaches a city intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, passing pedestrians and parked cars while the earlier purple building recedes into the left background.
